commit_scope: Add a pure Form infix-operator conformance vector and widen the Rust/Go runners to pass it alongside the existing core built-ins and question-effect vectors.

commands: curl -sS --max-time 5 https://pulse.coherencycoin.com/pulse/now | jq '{overall, silences: (.ongoing_silences | length), silent_organs: [.organs[] | select(.status != "breathing") | .name]}'

python3 scripts/context_budget.py --token-budget 80000 scripts/verify_kernel_conformance.py api/tests/test_kernel_conformance_harness.py specs/form-infix-kernel-conformance.md specs/form-core-kernel-conformance.md docs/coherence-substrate/form-language.md docs/coherence-substrate/kernel-conformance/README.md docs/coherence-substrate/kernel-conformance/form-infix-operators.json docs/coherence-substrate/kernel-conformance/form-core-builtins.json docs/coherence-substrate/kernel-conformance/agent-question-effects.json experiments/form-question-kernels/rust/src/main.rs experiments/form-question-kernels/go/question_kernel.go

cd api && /Users/ursmuff/source/Coherence-Network/api/.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_kernel_conformance_harness.py tests/test_substrate_form_question_effects.py tests/test_substrate_form_endpoint.py tests/test_agent_question_sse.py -q
git stash push -u -m codex-rebase-form-infix-kernel-vector && git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main && git stash pop
local_validation.summary: Pulse was breathing at arrival. The branch adds form-infix-operators.json, expands the Rust/Go runners from literal function-call conformance to a tiny literal infix parser for arithmetic precedence, parentheses, integer division, modulo, unary minus, comparisons, boolean chains, unary not, and string equality, and documents the bounded claim. Python, Rust, and Go pass the new infix vector, the core built-ins vector, and the existing question-effect vector. Focused conformance, API/SSE regression tests, toolchain checks, formatting, Ruff, spec quality, generated indexes, JSON syntax, wellness, whitespace, local PR guard, and stale PR follow-through passed.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation passed; CI, PR, and post-merge deploy checks are pending.
